docs.text: FAQ Can I add more pages? Yes. Add more .md files in the docs/ folder and update mkdocs.yml . Will it show a left menu? Yes, when opened through MkDocs, the sidebar appears on the left.
docs.title: FAQ

docs.text: Yes. Add more .md files in the docs/ folder and update mkdocs.yml .
